message:
Merge PR #2262: Fix wisp reaper to discover all Dolt databases dynamically

Fixes two bugs in the wisp reaper database list:
1. DefaultDatabases had "gastown" instead of "gt" (wrong DB name)
2. Dynamically-added rig databases were never reaped

Adds DiscoverDatabases() to the reaper package, which queries SHOW DATABASES
at runtime and filters out system databases and test pollution. The inline
fallback in wisp_reaper.go now uses dynamic discovery instead of the static
default list.

Based on the approach from PR #2262 by yoyo999888, adapted to the current
reaper package architecture.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2262
Co-authored-by: yoyo999888 <yoyo999888@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
